extensionName.message: 拾贝 — 网页收藏助手

extensionDescription.message: 一键保存网页快照到拾贝桌面端

statusOnline.description: Connection status when desktop app is running

statusOffline.description: Connection status when desktop app is not running

offlineNotice.description: Notice shown when desktop app is not running

btnSaveFullPage.description: Button text for full page save

captureEmpty.description: Error when capture returns empty result

captureDone.description: Status text when capture is done

unsupportedPage.description: Error for system pages like chrome://

untitled.description: Fallback title when page has no title

urlSavedCount.message: 该 URL 已保存过 $COUNT$ 次
urlSavedCount.description: Warning when URL was saved before

folderLoadFailed.description: Error when folder list fails to load

selectFolder.description: Error when no folder is selected

errorPageRestricted.message: 页面受安全策略限制，无法抓取

errorNoPageInfo.message: 无法获取当前页面信息
errorNoPageInfo.description: Error when page info is unavailable

injectParamsFailed.description: Error when injecting save params fails

injectSelectorFailed.description: Error when injecting region selector script fails

selectRegionPrompt.message: 请在页面中选择要保存的区域
selectRegionPrompt.description: Prompt shown after entering region selection mode

regionTopBarGuide.message: 选择要保存的区域 — 滚轮或方向键调整层级 — ESC 退出
regionTopBarGuide.description: Top bar guide text in region selector

regionSelected.message: 已选择: <$TAG$> — 确认保存或重新选择
regionSelected.description: Top bar text after element is selected

regionWaitingCapture.message: 已选择: <$TAG$> — 等待页面抓取完成...
regionWaitingCapture.description: Top bar text while waiting for capture to finish

regionSaving.description: Top bar text while saving region

regionWaitingCaptureToast.description: Toast while waiting for page capture

regionCaptureFailed.description: Toast when page capture fails in region mode

regionClipFailed.message: 裁剪失败 — 未找到选区元素
regionClipFailed.description: Toast when clip fails to find selected element

regionParamsLost.message: 保存参数丢失，请重新操作
regionParamsLost.description: Toast when save params are missing

relaySaveFailed.description: Error message from relay when save fails
